name: Globals → Set
description: This [Action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) allows you to change the value of a `global` variable without having to use the lambda syntax.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The [ID](https://esphome.io/guides/configuration-types#id) of the global variable to set.

config_entries.label: Value
config_entries.description: The value to set the global variable to.
